title: orthopogon stagninus
intro: Orthopogon stagninus, also known as Veldt grass or Thatch grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Orthopogon stagninus include its ability to soothe wounds and reduce fever, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Orthopogon stagninus can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
